metadata.name: NIST Cybersecurity Framework
metadata.description: The NIST Cybersecurity Framework provides a policy framework of computer security guidance for organizations to assess and improve their ability to prevent, detect, and respond to cyber attacks.
metadata.source_organization: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
metadata.classification_reasoning: The NIST CSF is a voluntary framework providing guidance for organizations to manage cybersecurity risk. While not mandatory for most private sector organizations, it is required for US federal agencies and widely adopted as a compliance standard.
metadata.framework_purpose: To provide organizations with a structured approach to managing and reducing cybersecurity risk through a common language for understanding, managing, and expressing cybersecurity risk.
metadata.framework_scope: All organizations seeking to improve their cybersecurity posture, including critical infrastructure operators, government agencies, and private sector entities.
framework_objectives: Identify and prioritize opportunities for improvement
Communicate among stakeholders about cybersecurity risk
metadata.target_audience: CISOs, IT Security Teams, Risk Managers, and Executive Leadership of organizations seeking to improve cybersecurity
metadata.regulatory_authority: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
metadata.penalty_for_non_compliance: No direct penalties for private sector. Federal agencies may face audit findings. Organizations may face contractual or regulatory requirements to demonstrate CSF alignment.
metadata.adoption_approach: Risk-based, voluntary adoption with tiered implementation levels. Organizations assess current state, define target state, and develop action plans.

controls.title: Physical Device Inventory
controls.description: Physical devices and systems within the organization are inventoried.
controls.full_text: Physical devices and systems within the organization are inventoried. This includes hardware assets such as servers, workstations, laptops, mobile devices, network equipment, and IoT devices.

controls.title: Software Platform Inventory
controls.description: Software platforms and applications within the organization are inventoried.
controls.full_text: Software platforms and applications within the organization are inventoried. This includes operating systems, applications, firmware, and cloud-based services.

controls.title: Data Flow Mapping
controls.description: Organizational communication and data flows are mapped.
controls.full_text: Organizational communication and data flows are mapped. This includes understanding how data moves within and outside the organization.

controls.title: Resource Prioritization
controls.description: Resources are prioritized based on their classification, criticality, and business value.
controls.full_text: Resources (hardware, devices, data, time, personnel, and software) are prioritized based on their classification, criticality, and business value.

controls.title: Supply Chain Role
controls.description: The organization's role in the supply chain is identified and communicated.
controls.full_text: The organization's role in the supply chain is identified and communicated to relevant stakeholders.

controls.title: Critical Infrastructure Role
controls.description: The organization's place in critical infrastructure and its industry sector is identified.
controls.full_text: The organization's place in critical infrastructure and its industry sector is identified and communicated.

controls.title: Organizational Cybersecurity Policy
controls.description: Organizational cybersecurity policy is established and communicated.
controls.full_text: Organizational cybersecurity policy is established and communicated. The policy addresses roles, responsibilities, and coordination among organizational entities.

controls.title: Cybersecurity Roles Coordination
controls.description: Cybersecurity roles and responsibilities are coordinated and aligned with internal roles and external partners.
controls.full_text: Cybersecurity roles and responsibilities are coordinated and aligned with internal roles and external partners to ensure comprehensive coverage.

controls.title: Asset Vulnerabilities Identified
controls.description: Asset vulnerabilities are identified and documented.
controls.full_text: Asset vulnerabilities are identified and documented through vulnerability scanning, penetration testing, and security assessments.

controls.title: Threat Intelligence
controls.description: Cyber threat intelligence is received from information sharing forums and sources.
controls.full_text: Cyber threat intelligence is received from information sharing forums and sources. The organization participates in threat information sharing.

controls.title: Threats Identified
controls.description: Threats, both internal and external, are identified and documented.
controls.full_text: Threats, both internal and external, are identified and documented based on threat intelligence and organizational context.

controls.title: Risk Prioritization
controls.description: Threats, vulnerabilities, likelihoods, and impacts are used to determine risk.
controls.full_text: Threats, vulnerabilities, likelihoods, and impacts are used to determine risk. Risks are prioritized based on business impact.

controls.title: Supply Chain Risk Management
controls.description: Cyber supply chain risk management processes are identified and documented.
controls.full_text: Cyber supply chain risk management processes are identified, established, assessed, managed, and agreed to by organizational stakeholders.

controls.title: Identity and Credential Management
controls.description: Identities and credentials are issued, managed, verified, revoked, and audited.
controls.full_text: Identities and credentials are issued, managed, verified, revoked, and audited for authorized devices, users, and processes.

controls.title: Physical Access Management
controls.description: Physical access to assets is managed and protected.
controls.full_text: Physical access to assets is managed and protected. Physical access controls are implemented to protect facilities and equipment.

controls.title: Remote Access Management
controls.description: Remote access is managed.
controls.full_text: Remote access is managed. Remote connections are authenticated and authorized before access is granted.

controls.title: Least Privilege
controls.description: Access permissions and authorizations are managed incorporating least privilege and separation of duties.
controls.full_text: Access permissions and authorizations are managed, incorporating the principles of least privilege and separation of duties.

controls.title: Network Integrity Protection
controls.description: Network integrity is protected incorporating network segregation where appropriate.
controls.full_text: Network integrity is protected (e.g., network segregation, network segmentation) where appropriate.

controls.title: Security Awareness Training
controls.description: All users are informed and trained.
controls.full_text: All users are informed and trained on cybersecurity awareness and their specific security responsibilities.

controls.title: Privileged Users Training
controls.description: Privileged users understand their roles and responsibilities.
controls.full_text: Privileged users understand their roles and responsibilities and receive specialized training.

controls.title: Data-at-Rest Protection
controls.description: Data-at-rest is protected.
controls.full_text: Data-at-rest is protected through encryption, access controls, and other protective measures.

controls.title: Data-in-Transit Protection
controls.description: Data-in-transit is protected.
controls.full_text: Data-in-transit is protected through encryption and secure transmission protocols.

controls.title: Data Leakage Prevention
controls.description: Protections against data leaks are implemented.
controls.full_text: Protections against data leaks are implemented through DLP tools, access controls, and monitoring.

controls.title: Baseline Configuration
controls.description: A baseline configuration of IT systems is created and maintained.
controls.full_text: A baseline configuration of information technology/industrial control systems is created and maintained incorporating security principles.

controls.title: Configuration Change Control
controls.description: Configuration change control processes are in place.
controls.full_text: Configuration change control processes are in place to manage changes to systems and components.

controls.title: Data Backup
controls.description: Backups of information are conducted, maintained, and tested.
controls.full_text: Backups of information are conducted, maintained, and tested to ensure data can be recovered.

controls.title: Vulnerability Management Plan
controls.description: A vulnerability management plan is developed and implemented.
controls.full_text: A vulnerability management plan is developed and implemented to identify and remediate vulnerabilities.

controls.title: Maintenance Performed
controls.description: Maintenance and repair of organizational assets is performed and logged.
controls.full_text: Maintenance and repair of organizational assets is performed and logged in a timely manner with approved and controlled tools.

controls.title: Audit Logging
controls.description: Audit/log records are determined, documented, implemented, and reviewed.
controls.full_text: Audit/log records are determined, documented, implemented, and reviewed in accordance with policy.

controls.title: Least Functionality
controls.description: The principle of least functionality is incorporated by configuring systems to provide only essential capabilities.
controls.full_text: The principle of least functionality is incorporated by configuring systems to provide only essential capabilities.

controls.title: Network Baseline
controls.description: A baseline of network operations and expected data flows is established and managed.
controls.full_text: A baseline of network operations and expected data flows for users and systems is established and managed.

controls.title: Detected Events Analysis
controls.description: Detected events are analyzed to understand attack targets and methods.
controls.full_text: Detected events are analyzed to understand attack targets and methods.

controls.title: Event Data Correlation
controls.description: Event data are collected and correlated from multiple sources and sensors.
controls.full_text: Event data are collected and correlated from multiple sources and sensors to enable comprehensive analysis.

controls.title: Network Monitoring
controls.description: The network is monitored to detect potential cybersecurity events.
controls.full_text: The network is monitored to detect potential cybersecurity events through network monitoring tools and processes.

controls.title: Malicious Code Detection
controls.description: Malicious code is detected.
controls.full_text: Malicious code is detected through anti-malware solutions and other detection mechanisms.

controls.title: Unauthorized Activity Monitoring
controls.description: Monitoring for unauthorized personnel, connections, devices, and software is performed.
controls.full_text: Monitoring for unauthorized personnel, connections, devices, and software is performed.

controls.title: Detection Roles and Responsibilities
controls.description: Roles and responsibilities for detection are well defined.
controls.full_text: Roles and responsibilities for detection are well defined to ensure accountability.

controls.title: Response Plan Execution
controls.description: Response plan is executed during or after an incident.
controls.full_text: Response plan is executed during or after an incident to contain and mitigate the impact.

controls.title: Personnel Roles in Response
controls.description: Personnel know their roles and order of operations when a response is needed.
controls.full_text: Personnel know their roles and order of operations when a response is needed.

controls.title: Incident Investigation
controls.description: Notifications from detection systems are investigated.
controls.full_text: Notifications from detection systems are investigated to determine the scope and impact of incidents.

controls.title: Incident Containment
controls.description: Incidents are contained.
controls.full_text: Incidents are contained to prevent further damage and limit the scope of impact.

controls.title: Incident Mitigation
controls.description: Incidents are mitigated.
controls.full_text: Incidents are mitigated through remediation actions and security improvements.

controls.title: Lessons Learned
controls.description: Response plans incorporate lessons learned.
controls.full_text: Response plans incorporate lessons learned from incidents and exercises.

controls.title: Recovery Plan Execution
controls.description: Recovery plan is executed during or after a cybersecurity incident.
controls.full_text: Recovery plan is executed during or after a cybersecurity incident to restore systems and operations.

controls.title: Recovery Plan Improvement
controls.description: Recovery plans incorporate lessons learned into future activities.
controls.full_text: Recovery plans incorporate lessons learned into future activities for continuous improvement.

controls.title: Public Relations Management
controls.description: Public relations are managed.
controls.full_text: Public relations are managed during and after incidents to maintain stakeholder confidence.
